tours.title: Divine Ashtavinayak Yatra
tours.tagline: A spiritual journey covering Maharashtra's sacred Ganpati temples
tours.description: Embark on a sacred pilgrimage to all eight revered Ganpati temples of Maharashtra. This carefully curated 3-day journey takes you through the divine circuit of Morgaon, Siddhatek, Pali, Mahad, Theur, Lenyadri, Ozar, and Ranjangaon.

itinerary.title: Pune - Morgaon - Siddhatek - Pali
itinerary.details: Early morning departure from Pune. Visit Shri Mayureshwar Temple at Morgaon, Shri Siddhi Vinayak at Siddhatek, and Shri Ballaleshwar at Pali. Overnight stay at Pali.

itinerary.title: Mahad - Theur - Lenyadri
itinerary.details: After breakfast, visit Shri Varadvinayak at Mahad, Shri Chintamani at Theur, and Shri Girijatmaj at Lenyadri (requires climbing 300+ steps). Overnight stay near Ozar.

itinerary.title: Ozar - Ranjangaon - Pune
itinerary.details: Morning darshan at Shri Vighnahar at Ozar and Shri Mahaganapati at Ranjangaon. Return to Pune by evening with divine blessings.

tours.title: The Roar of Tadoba
tours.tagline: Experience India's premier Tiger Reserve with expert-led safaris
tours.description: Discover the raw beauty of Tadoba Andhari Tiger Reserve, Maharashtra's largest and oldest national park. With one of India's highest tiger densities, every safari promises an unforgettable encounter with the wild.

itinerary.title: Pune/Mumbai - Tadoba
itinerary.details: Travel to Tadoba Andhari Tiger Reserve. Check-in at the jungle resort. Evening orientation about the park and wildlife.

itinerary.title: Full Day Safari
itinerary.details: Early morning and afternoon safari in the core zone. Spot Royal Bengal Tigers, Leopards, Sloth Bears, Wild Dogs, and over 195 species of birds.

itinerary.title: Safari & Buffer Zone
itinerary.details: Morning safari in the buffer zone. Afternoon at leisure or optional nature walk. Evening campfire and wildlife photography session.

itinerary.title: Tadoba - Return
itinerary.details: Early morning birdwatching. After breakfast, check-out and return journey with memories of the wild.

tours.title: Shop the World: Dubai
tours.tagline: Curated shopping festivals, luxury stays, and iconic city tours
tours.description: Experience the glamour of Dubai with our carefully crafted package. From the towering Burj Khalifa to the gold-laden souks, from desert safaris to luxury mall shopping - this trip has it all.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Dubai
itinerary.details: Arrive at Dubai International Airport. Hotel check-in. Evening free for Dubai Mall visit and Burj Khalifa views.

itinerary.title: Dubai City Tour
itinerary.details: Full day city tour covering Jumeirah Mosque, Palm Jumeirah, Atlantis, Dubai Frame, and Gold & Spice Souks. Evening Dhow Cruise dinner.

itinerary.title: Desert Safari
itinerary.details: Morning at leisure for shopping at Mall of Emirates. Afternoon desert safari with dune bashing, camel riding, BBQ dinner with entertainment.

itinerary.title: Abu Dhabi Day Trip
itinerary.details: Full day excursion to Abu Dhabi. Visit Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Emirates Palace, and Yas Island. Return to Dubai.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.details: Last minute shopping at Global Village or Dubai Outlet Mall. Transfer to airport for return flight.

tours.title: Singapore Experience
tours.tagline: The Lion City awaits with gardens, culture, and culinary delights
tours.description: Explore the vibrant city-state of Singapore. From the futuristic Gardens by the Bay to the cultural enclaves of Chinatown and Little India, experience a perfect blend of tradition and modernity.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Marina Bay
itinerary.details: Arrive at Changi Airport. City orientation tour. Evening at Marina Bay Sands and Gardens by the Bay light show.

itinerary.title: Sentosa Island
itinerary.details: Full day at Sentosa Island. Visit Universal Studios Singapore, S.E.A. Aquarium, and enjoy the beaches.

itinerary.title: Cultural Tour
itinerary.details: Explore Chinatown, Little India, and Arab Street. Visit Merlion Park. Afternoon at Orchard Road for shopping.

itinerary.title: Nature & Night Safari
itinerary.details: Morning at Singapore Botanic Gardens. Afternoon at leisure. Evening Night Safari experience.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.details: Morning free for last-minute shopping. Transfer to Changi Airport.

tours.title: Konkan Coastal Retreat
tours.tagline: Premium Konkan beaches, temples, and Malvani cuisine
tours.description: Escape to the pristine beaches of Konkan coast. From the white sands of Tarkarli to the historic Sindhudurg Fort, experience the untouched beauty of Maharashtra's coastline with authentic Malvani hospitality.

itinerary.title: Pune - Ganpatipule
itinerary.details: Depart from Pune. Visit the famous Ganpatipule Swayambhu Ganpati Temple. Evening at the pristine Ganpatipule Beach. Overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Ganpatipule - Tarkarli
itinerary.details: Drive along the scenic Konkan coast to Tarkarli. En route visit Jaigad Fort. Evening at Tarkarli Beach with Malvani seafood dinner.

itinerary.title: Tarkarli & Sindhudurg
itinerary.details: Morning scuba diving or snorkeling at Tarkarli. Afternoon boat ride to Sindhudurg Fort. Evening bonfire at beach campsite.

itinerary.title: Return to Pune
itinerary.details: After breakfast, visit Vengurla Beach. Begin return journey to Pune via Amboli Ghat with scenic stops.

tours.title: Jim Corbett Tiger Safari
tours.tagline: India's oldest national park and the heart of Project Tiger
tours.description: Journey to Jim Corbett National Park, established in 1936 as India's first national park. Home to the majestic Royal Bengal Tiger and set against the backdrop of the Himalayan foothills, this is a wildlife experience like no other.

itinerary.title: Delhi - Corbett
itinerary.details: Drive from Delhi to Jim Corbett National Park (approx 6 hrs). Check-in at riverside resort. Evening nature walk along the Kosi River.

itinerary.title: Dhikala Zone Safari
itinerary.details: Full day safari in the famous Dhikala zone. Spot Tigers, Elephants, Deer, and Gharials. Packed lunch in the park.

itinerary.title: Bijrani Zone Safari
itinerary.details: Morning safari in Bijrani zone. Afternoon visit to Corbett Museum and Garjia Devi Temple. Evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Return to Delhi
itinerary.details: Early morning birdwatching. After breakfast, check-out and drive back to Delhi.
